title: Template coverage declaration
description: Schema for the per-component-repo `.specfuse/templates.yaml` file. Declares which Specfuse generator template tokens the repo supports, consumed by the PM agent's template-coverage-check skill (Phase 2 WU 2.6) at plan time. This is a stub protocol that Phase 5 replaces with a real generator query — see `agents/pm/skills/template-coverage-check/SKILL.md` §Deferred integration.

schema_version.description: Version of this declaration-file contract. Bumped on breaking changes to the schema. Phase 2 stub is v1.

provided_templates.description: List of generator template tokens this component repo supports. Tokens are free-form kebab-case strings (no central registry at v1); matching against feature task graph `required_templates` is exact-string. An empty list declares the repo provides no generator templates — a task on this repo with any `required_templates` will fail coverage.
